title: BEM-722A watchdog rule
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/autonomy','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 11:13 (UTC+3)'
rule=sep+'## BEM-722A | Обязательное правило минутного мониторинга Claude mailbox'+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Если GPT обращается к внутреннему аудитору Claude через mailbox, GPT обязан включить периодический мониторинг ответа с интервалом 1 минута или минимально доступным интервалом. Мониторинг продолжается до результата: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Отчёт не останавливает работу. Если ответа нет, агент не ждёт оператора, а диагностирует причину и продолжает автономный контур.'+sep
for path in ['governance/protocols/AUTONOMY_CONTINUITY_CONTRACT_EXTENSION.md','governance/protocols/MANDATORY_CHATGPT_TASK_MONITOR_RULE.md']:
    p=Path(path)
    old=p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else '# '+p.name+sep
    if 'BEM-722A | Обязательное правило минутного мониторинга Claude mailbox' not in old:
        p.write_text(old+rule)
active=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
active.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v1','active':True,'run_id':'bem703_bem712_watchdog','interval_seconds':60,'until':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED','operator_role':'none','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | MINUTE WATCHDOG REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'BEM-722A active. Next step: install minute watchdog workflow/script. Do not stop after reports.'+sep)
checks=[{'name':'rule_written','pass':True,'evidence':'governance/protocols/AUTONOMY_CONTINUITY_CONTRACT_EXTENSION.md'},{'name':'active_flag_enabled','pass':active.exists(),'evidence':str(active)}]
state={'schema_version':'contract_rule_watchdog_flag.v1','bem':'BEM-722A','status':'watchdog_rule_and_flag_installed','checks':checks,'next':'install minute watchdog workflow/script','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem722a_contract_rule_watchdog_flag.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem722a_contract_rule_watchdog_flag.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-722A | Contract Rule Watchdog Flag | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Rule and active watchdog flag installed. Next: workflow/script.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem722a_contract_rule_watchdog_flag','status':'watchdog_rule_and_flag_installed','blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem722a_contract_rule_watchdog_flag.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-722A PASS: watchdog rule and active flag installed.\n')
changed_files.extend(['governance/protocols/AUTONOMY_CONTINUITY_CONTRACT_EXTENSION.md','governance/protocols/MANDATORY_CHATGPT_TASK_MONITOR_RULE.md',str(active),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Installed mandatory minute-monitoring contract rule and active watchdog flag for Claude mailbox')
"""
